name: Vesper's Host — secret chests & loot
author: Ghost Companion (starter pack)
description: Walkthroughs for the two hidden secret chests in the Vesper's Host dungeon, plus a loot overview linked to Ice Breaker. Community-sourced starter content — verify exact spots in-game and refine via the Create Guide form.

guides.title: Vesper's Host — loot & exotic overview

steps.title: What drops here
steps.description: Vesper's Host is the Revenant-era dungeon aboard a derelict BrayTech station. It rewards the dungeon weapon set plus the Exotic Sniper Rifle Ice Breaker, which can drop from the final boss.

steps.title: Farming Ice Breaker
steps.description: Ice Breaker is a rare (low-rate) drop from the final encounter. Full clears are repeatable for additional rolls; the two secret chests below add bonus loot on the way through.

steps.title: Before you start
steps.description: Bring stasis or anti-barrier as the season's mods dictate, and a teammate or two — the augment/encounter mechanics are easier split across roles.

guides.notes: Drop sources are community-reported; confirm against the in-game collections/triumphs for your current season.

guides.title: Secret Chest 1 — opening descent

steps.title: Reach the first platforming section
steps.description: From the start, follow the station interior until you hit the first vertical drop / jumping-puzzle shaft before the opening encounter.

steps.title: Take the side route, not the main door
steps.description: Instead of continuing straight toward the encounter arena, look for the offshoot ledge/maintenance gap to the side of the main path.

steps.title: Follow it to the chest alcove
steps.description: Drop/jump along the offshoot to a small dead-end alcove where the first secret chest sits. Open it before moving on — it does not persist if you wipe past it.

guides.notes: Starter directions — verify the exact ledge in-game and edit this guide with precise landmarks via the Create Guide form.

guides.title: Secret Chest 2 — pre-boss platforming

steps.title: Clear to the final platforming gauntlet
steps.description: Progress to the jumping-puzzle section that leads into the final boss arena.

steps.title: Break from the route at the branch
steps.description: Midway through the gauntlet there's a branch away from the obvious path — take the harder/longer jump rather than the direct line to the boss door.

steps.title: Claim the chest
steps.description: The branch ends at the second secret chest. Loot it, then return to the main route and continue to the boss.

guides.notes: Starter directions — confirm the branch location in-game and refine with exact landmarks.
